case_title: RATUSH VIKTOR VS COMPUTECH (MOGHADDASIAN MONSOUR) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,450.00 FILED BY RATUSH VIKTOR AS TO DEFENDANT COMPUTECH  (MOGHADDASIAN MONSOUR) MOGHADDASIAN MONSOUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RATUSH VIKTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOGHADDASIAN MONSOUR $1,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,470.00, PLTF TO RETURN PURCHASED COMPUTER TO DEFT MOGHADDA SIAN AT TIME OF RECEIPT OF PAYMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23451, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-13-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RATUSH VIKTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMPUTECH  (MOGHADDASIAN MONSOUR) DEFENDANT TO FURNISH 5 HOURS OF SERVICING COMPUTER WITHOUT CHARGE TO PLTFF, NEITHER ONE RECOVERS COST STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO MONSOUR MOGHADDSIAN RETURNED SIGNED.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MOGHADDASIAN MONSOUR
